title: Marketing Mix Modeling Workbench
summary: Explore channel contribution, lag, saturation, and scenario planning for budget allocation.
knowledge_base: Marketing Mix Modeling Workbench is positioned as a Marketing Science starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Explore channel contribution, lag, saturation, and scenario planning for budget allocation.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on mmm, budget, marketing.

app_modules.label: Studio 01
app_modules.title: Opportunity Scorecard
app_modules.description: Score the current opportunity shape before deciding what to prioritize next.
app_modules.hint: Opportunity score and top factors will appear here.

app_modules.label: Studio 02
app_modules.title: Metric Storyline
app_modules.description: Translate KPI movement into a concise summary for product, growth, or finance stakeholders.
app_modules.hint: Metric storyline summary will appear here.

app_modules.label: Studio 03
app_modules.title: Decision Memo
app_modules.description: Generate the next action memo grounded in the project-specific context.
